adjective_forms: selb- (only used in compound forms: derselbe, dieselbe, dasselbe, etc.)
notes: 'selbe' is a declined form of 'selb-', which only appears as part of compound pronouns/determiners: derselbe, dieselbe, dasselbe, denselben, etc. It means 'the same' and is not used independently. Not to be confused with 'gleich' (identical but separate objects) — 'derselbe' refers to the exact same object.

sentences.german: Wir gehen jeden Tag in dasselbe Café.
sentences.english: We go to the same café every day.
He always wears the same jacket.
